judge_result.short_rationale: Answer includes all required actions in correct order: remove contaminated clothing, wash skin thoroughly with soap and water, and seek medical attention. It also preserves the grounded do-not-reuse warning and escalation after washing. Slightly downgraded usability because the extra labels and repeated medical-escalation wording are less field-direct than the approved rendering.
